title: Respiratory Therapist
description: AstraZeneca is seeking a Respiratory Therapist for our Austin facility to support respiratory research and clinical programs. Work hybrid in a pharmaceutical environment advancing respiratory medicine.
responsibilities: Provide respiratory care support for clinical research studies
Assist with pulmonary function testing and patient assessments
Manage respiratory equipment and ensure proper operation
Monitor patient respiratory status during research protocols
Document observations and maintain research records
Support quality control and protocol compliance

requirements.education: Associate's degree or Bachelor's degree in Respiratory Therapy
skills: Knowledge of pharmaceutical research and protocols
Pulmonary function testing and equipment operation
Attention to detail and regulatory compliance
Ability to work in research environment
